title: Add a partner to a BC
content:
Use this endpoint to add a partner and optionally share your assets to a Business Center. A Business Center can only share assets it owns. You need to be an Admin of the Business Center. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| | Endpoint path | /v1.2/bc/partner/add/ | /v1.3/bc/partner/add/ | | Request parameter data type | `bc_id`: number
`partner_id`: number
`asset_ids`: number[] | `bc_id`: string
`partner_id`: string
`asset_ids`: string[] | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/partner/add/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type{Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`. | ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | ID of your Business Center.| | partner_id {Required} | string | ID of the Business Center to add as a partner Business Center. | | asset_type | string | The type of asset to share with the partner Business Center.

Enum value: `ADVERTISER` (ad account).| | asset_ids | string[] | The list of asset IDs to share with the partner Business Center.

Max size: 50. | | advertiser_role | string | Valid only when `asset_type` is `ADVERTISER`.

Ad account role assigned to the partner Business Center.

Enum values:
  • `ADMIN`: Admin. Manage ad account finances, settings, and permissions. Create and edit ad campaigns and view performance data.
  • `OPERATOR`: Operator. Manage finances for ad accounts, create and edit ad campaigns, and view performance data.
  • `ANALYST`: Analyst. View ads and performance data.
Default value when `asset_type` is `ADVERTISER`: `ANALYST`.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "bc_id": "BC_ID", "partner_id": "PARTNER_ID", "asset_type": "ASSET_TYPE", "asset_ids": [ "ASSET_IDS" ], "advertiser_role": "ADVERTISER_ROLE", "catalog_role": "CATALOG_ROLE" }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/partner/add/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
